stem: A triangle has interior angles measuring 80° and 40° at its base. The two non-base sides are extended beyond the top vertex. The angle outside the triangle, between the two extensions above the top vertex, measures y°. What is the value of y?
rationale: Choice C is correct. The third interior angle is 180 − 80 − 40 = 60°. The angle formed by the two extensions above the top vertex is vertical to this top interior angle, so y = 60.
